chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 1490 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Pervaiz Tariq Tagar, Advocate for applicant Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G. Complainant present in person Complainant is present in person and submits that the fans from his godown were stolen. He did not know the people who had stolen the fans; however, subsequently the police put the applicant’s name along with others in the FIR and told the Complainant that we have made a recovery from the applicant and co-accused and therefore they are the accused persons. On the face of it mala fide on the part of the police cannot be eliminated conclusively at this preliminary stage. There is no other evidence against the applicant apart from an alleged recovery of a component of the fans. In view of the representation made by the Complainant the case against the applicant is one of further inquiry. He therefore, is admitted to post-arrest bail against a surety of Rs. 1,00,000/- (One Lac) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial court. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
